title: crotalaria cephalotes
intro: Crotalaria cephalotes, also known as the yellow rattle or yellow rattle weed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Crotalaria cephalotes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying the flowers and leaves, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or tincture that can be used to treat various health conditions.
